full_text:
Chen Deng (Yuanlong) 陳登 (元龍)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Deng (陳登), styledYuanlong (元龍), was born in Xiapi commandery. Spied on Lü Bu with his father, Chen Gui, for Cao Cao. Chen Deng was affiliated with Tao Qian, Lu Bu, the Shu Kingdom, and the Wei Kingdom. Chen Deng lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
